system_prompt: You are a software requirements engineering assistant. Return ONLY valid JSON with no explanation.
user_prompt:
Using the cleaned user reviews below for the MindDoc app, do two tasks:

1. Create exactly 5 review groups.
2. Create exactly 5 personas, one derived from each review group.

Rules:
- Use only the review IDs given below.
- Each group must have at least 10 review_ids.
- Keep themes meaningful and distinct.
- Personas must be grounded in the grouped reviews.
- Do not invent unsupported claims.
- Return JSON ONLY in this exact schema:

{
  "groups": [
    {
      "group_id": "A1",
      "theme": "short theme",
      "review_ids": [1, 2, 3],
      "example_reviews": [
        "short example review text 1",
        "short example review text 2"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "personas": [
    {
      "id": "P1",
      "name": "Persona Name",
      "description": "1-2 sentence description",
      "derived_from_group": "G1",
      "goals": ["goal1", "goal2"],
      "pain_points": ["pain1", "pain2"],
      "context": ["context1", "context2"],
      "constraints": ["constraint1", "constraint2"],
      "evidence_reviews": [1, 2]
    }
  ]
}

Reviews:
review_id: 2886 | content: its really cool but i cant make the call they are talking about
review_id: 506 | content: would recommend its a great companion that after a while becomes second nature to log your responses into the calendar that shows my trend of responses and feelings helps me see when im starting to spiral so i can be proactive about it i also journal so that helps me notice the things that trigger me the questions are mostly repetitive bit sometimes they throw extras in there that really helpful and insightful would recommend
review_id: 117 | content: any decent features are locked and its just an ad for better health
review_id: 3350 | content: it helps my doctor see how my medications are working its a great app
review_id: 1231 | content: easy to track moods informative overview quick response from the team in case of any issues would be better if the app fully worked offline i dont always have connection throughout the day
review_id: 1100 | content: moodpath has made my life so much easier ive been told to keep a mood diary by my therapists in the past however i never followed through because i didnt know where to begin and how to go about it with moodpath theres a framework in place and i can just mark my moods and reflect on them its great an app which can help me keep a record of my mental health such a useful and relevant tool d
review_id: 1004 | content: stupid pop psych bs and other nonsense you gotta be a fool to trust an app to evaluate your mental health
review_id: 626 | content: they finally fixed the issue where the app wasnt notifying you too make an entry new questions were added so its less repetitive wish there was new audio content added but still love this app
review_id: 3326 | content: this app is no longer prompting me for questions so i forget to document frequently when i do remember to wake up and document without promting the app wont give my the daily questions settings for wake up are am and its now am and i havent been given any questions i can record my mood and thoughts but it also frequently says i missed questions how am i missing them if they dont show up for me to answer
review_id: 468 | content: minddoc is an immaculate mental health and emotional support and mood tracking app thta i highly recommend to anyone who wishes to record their day to day experience and have a detailed analysis of a day cycle morning afternoon and evening as well as great insight material for mindfulness and understanding ones mental health keep up the amazing work nameste
review_id: 3057 | content: amazing app keeps your mood track everyday so you can see the bigger picture after a considerable time passes
review_id: 3345 | content: i think the app is wonderful it helps you better acknowledge your moods and allows you to be more aware of how you feel i also think the assessment after weeks was accurate i will continue to use this app
review_id: 2457 | content: this is epically awesome really helpful seeing how my moods change and when they change also the the tips you give on how to help my issues are fantastic
review_id: 401 | content: i just want to thank you for your great app if it wasnt for it i couldnt diagnose my depression and got help from a professional so im thankful for saving my lifethis app helped me alot in my hardest time keep up the good work
review_id: 2664 | content: its a great app in my opinion even reccomended it to a few friends very helpful to be mindful of your emotions and seek help for the same
review_id: 1910 | content: its helping me understand myself better
review_id: 146 | content: a great app to use for anyone who has trouble figuring their problems out with a therapist or cant see one i have the premium version it helps me to figure out my mood patterns how to control my mood better and advises me on what to do when im feeling certain things there is a lot more i could say but those are the biggest positives to me
review_id: 138 | content: so far this app is been amazing for me it helps me keep on track with being aware of my mood how im feeling and things that i didnt even realize were a issue they asked me questions and its like clarity
review_id: 429 | content: app is crashing
review_id: 985 | content: mood path was great being able to add emotions to the list the various insights and audio files available being able to compile a record to provide to your doctor that was a solid and comprehensive timeline of emotional mental fluctuations was amazing was minddoc is not that anymore not without paying a monthly subscription considering how good it used to be its now really disappointing
review_id: 1043 | content: i literally love this app it helps me a lot
review_id: 2282 | content: i find it very helpful for me and i think this is one of the best app that i ever use absolutely love it
review_id: 2714 | content: a good reminder to check in on how youre doing mentally and emotionally regularly best suited for adults given the descriptions and psych vocabulary
review_id: 124 | content: clears cluttered out of mind
review_id: 2532 | content: this app is a very good tool to figuring out certain issues that you may not have acknowledged before the only issue is that to get some actual help you have to pay for all of the perks and it seems a bit too expensive
review_id: 892 | content: this app has helped me many situations where i was struggling to take control of my thoughts and emotions plus i love the courses that are available in the discover section highly recommend
review_id: 3235 | content: app completely stopped and was working just fine yesterday kinda frustrated eitherwise ive been using it for a long time and was great until now
review_id: 2932 | content: terrible this app bamboozled me out of didnt work and the company never gave me a refund after reaching out to them
review_id: 3166 | content: this is very helpful for me to just stop and pause and reflect it makes me feel better in a way i struggle with depression and anxiety this app was made for me
review_id: 2456 | content: i had wonderful experience with this app so far it lets me track my mood and make short comments about how i feel there times a day id only like the notification reminders were showing up regularly sometimes they are not showing up
review_id: 1899 | content: seems good so far
review_id: 992 | content: amazing it inspired me to go get treatment
review_id: 2030 | content: this app helps me break down my day and tracks my progress or regression its super helpful
review_id: 2659 | content: definitely a positive impact on my life it does help
review_id: 1245 | content: a uplifting app that helps you focus
review_id: 33 | content: right away requires a user account be created and the mandatory terms include you have to agree to the sharing of your personal and health information not for me
review_id: 3428 | content: i wish the symptomatic questions were a little more regular because it lines up sometimes that i never experience that symptom when it asks but then i do the other times and cant document it i also wish it would remember the emotions and events i select that isnt the default other than that its nice to have a regular reminder the document and track and the interface is nice and usable
review_id: 709 | content: this app has incredibly helpful when i got my first set of results it scared me so i started telling lies in my answers but that will never help anyone
review_id: 3152 | content: app is ok im unhappy with the fact that the questions sometimes jump back and it glitches and the questions dont really help me judge my state of mind
review_id: 1914 | content: i like daily checkin in this app it asks you questions about your mood everyday and gives you a report on every days it is the only feature i use in this app and i love it
review_id: 1535 | content: super helpful in identifying trends in your psyche theres a couple small glitches but its easy to use
review_id: 1244 | content: giving it a shotinsightful and helpful so far
review_id: 691 | content: terrific appfree version very useful if you are feeling poor or stingy use the free version until you know its worth month for you if you are not limited by finances go ahead buy into the paid version months
review_id: 970 | content: it got me to seek professional help and it was the best thing i did
review_id: 3451 | content: this is an extremely helpful app for me it helps me be more mindful of my actual mood and helps me to appreciate when im happy and recognise when im sad my only issue is i wish i could put a neutral mood option and that when i add emotions it would be good for them to stay there without needing to add them in each time thank you moodpath
review_id: 1518 | content: good moodtrackerslightly inaccurate and a few defects but overall good solid app
review_id: 467 | content: pretty interesting app would like some different emotions in the daily how do feel area but all around an interesting experience
review_id: 425 | content: i dont know i need better help its an alright app i guess
review_id: 1714 | content: this stopped me from killing myself this app did the thing nobody else could and i love this for that thank you mood path
review_id: 444 | content: exceeded my expectations with their results after i consistently answered questions up to three times a day i definitely feel like the questions and results from which are relevant and versatile i really like all of the helpful articles and it kind of feels like a mini course and they have it broken up into several articles and prompts to answer that really got you engaged and deeper in thought
review_id: 1616 | content: its alright i dont really think it should cost money to unlock things inside of it but its alright
review_id: 1551 | content: this app has helped me not only understand my mental health but helped me understand that i am not aloneby asking questions such as do you feel worth about yourself a lot right now this lets me know that other people arent the only ones yes
review_id: 2722 | content: almost useless without subscription
review_id: 1187 | content: the app asked great questions and gave help when needed and always has the help line available in the app
review_id: 198 | content: it helps ig
review_id: 3297 | content: simple interface easy to use but not receiving reminders to check in besides morning
review_id: 2074 | content: easy to use and helpful with the insights it gives
review_id: 2418 | content: its helping to log and understand my emotions
review_id: 562 | content: was really enjoying the app so i decided to pay the yearly fee no option to pay monthly now days later the app no longer works i uninstalled it and i cant even log back in after the reinstall i just get an error saying im not connected to the internet
review_id: 1708 | content: helps me reflect and with time i hope it will help me get out of the pit i am in xx
review_id: 362 | content: hello does that type of result indication of depressive episode is still available i havent got one of those for years but i do feel as bad as always so im wondering if it was discontinued
review_id: 2491 | content: amazing this app really helps track my emotions and gives me helpful insight on what i can do wish you didnt have to pay for the things that could help you overcome the things youre going through
review_id: 1316 | content: this app is very good i recommend you install it if you want to know how you feel every week or something
review_id: 2836 | content: amazing great way to track moods even when you really dont feel like it would recommend
review_id: 2791 | content: i live this even though i dont use it everyday like im suppose toit helps me out when im not feeling im highest
review_id: 1630 | content: theres something really wonderful about tracking your mood in a concise way
review_id: 2608 | content: i have been using the app for several months now and it is a useful tool for me to track my anxiety and depression and to discuss with my therapist the moodpath team was able to quickly transfer data for me after i reached out to them i was really impressed with the customer service however i would still like to suggest a dark mode for users with sensitive eyes the newest update had not been sending me notifications recently and i dont always remember to check the app on my own
review_id: 863 | content: hello i have been using the app for only a couple of days and everything is well so far a convenient and userfriendly app insights are worse reading i would probably add more feelings in the how do you feel section for example angry or inspired these are hard to describe in other words
review_id: 3183 | content: i love the audio and reading that comes with the daily questions to keep track of myself
review_id: 316 | content: it was the best app i could find for this category and i was extremely happy with this app
review_id: 208 | content: this app is exactly what i needed to help me with my anxiety and depression the app asks questions times a day and tracks your mood it then gives you insights on how to make situations better there are also classes to help you manage your life a lot better i tried to speak to a counselor today but was told it would be months before i could even get in but this app is so amazing and insightful that i believe that this is all i need this is a must have
review_id: 2983 | content: this app has helped me keep track of my mood consistently for over months thus far no other app has kept me consistently aware of my mood and mental health i am so grateful
review_id: 1024 | content: its a good app to track your emotions and mental health
review_id: 3493 | content: early days but interesting
review_id: 1298 | content: every therapist appointment asks how ive felt over the past weeks and i never had an answer before i could never remember because depression makes you forget they always said to journal but i never had the motivation to moodpath made tracking my feelings and moods so much easier it takes no time at all and asks me questions in a format thats easy for me to understand because of moodpath i finally know how bad my mental illness is and can get the help i need
review_id: 366 | content: cant do anything until they rob you clean
review_id: 1044 | content: as soon as i started ive actually felt more open to share my feelings with people close to me but im also trying to find out if i have depression or anxiety im only years nearly in january but ive always felt different like weird compare to other people i just feel like a freak so i came to the app to see if i do have problems and i think i may but at same time idk if i do so hopefully the app gives me the right answer
review_id: 462 | content: really insightful teaches self awareness which is key also very relevant and user friendly the more you put into it the more you can get out of it just wish there was a monthly subscription plan bucks is pretty steep for and app for a single mother but i could definitely see it being with the price overall
review_id: 2048 | content: i already know i have nothing so no need for meto install it but i did its a great app i didnt finish it but it looks pretty legit
review_id: 2870 | content: best app to get a tracking of your mood so far
review_id: 1645 | content: sometimes after it tells theres questions readyi do them and i feel a little better
review_id: 722 | content: love this app except for one thing whenever i try to create an account it doesnt let me createtype a password hence making me unable to make an account i had to factory reset my tablet so i wanted to save my journal entries alas i couldnt without an account pretty sad about that but this app is really good for reminding yourself you have feelings sometimes life gets too busy that you forget about your emotions helped me cope while i found the right therapist for me
review_id: 1671 | content: really useful app for tracking your mood and brilliant insights everyone should try this
review_id: 1600 | content: its pretty good
review_id: 941 | content: i enjoy the concept of this app but i need a reminder if i must input info xs daily personally i feel like one in depth check in would be sufficient and an expanded emotional declaration section might be more insightful ty
review_id: 3026 | content: very helpful to see patterns or just to reflect
review_id: 1197 | content: i am only starting moodpath but i can already tell that i am going to stick with it i only have a couple problems with the app i dont have good wifi and even if there are no questions i would still like to track my emotions plus you cant get rid of insights or questions even if you complain you have to look at them all day one insight happened to be an excuse my family uses to blame me for my problems and it made me tear up thinking about it but it was stuck there all day in plain view
review_id: 3169 | content: give it a shot
review_id: 3088 | content: i really loved this app it helped me keep track of what i was feeling every day edit they fixed the tag feature much happier with this great app for tracking your mood and progress
review_id: 2924 | content: helps track the constants
review_id: 324 | content: even the free version is really insightful
review_id: 2748 | content: moodpath is helpful because im not alone all the time
review_id: 2866 | content: best mood tracking app great outputs and it doesnt take time out of my day
review_id: 765 | content: really helps you see what your feeling every day and shows patterns of behavior
review_id: 2407 | content: helps me understand why i am feeling the way i feel on a day to day basis
review_id: 3295 | content: its really accurate
review_id: 1099 | content: i love moodpath it really helps me during depressive episodes to look back a month or two and remember that yes ive been happy before and i will be again
review_id: 725 | content: i like this app it helps keep track of my emotions and the different triggers of all the emotions helps with reflection and does give good insights
review_id: 2087 | content: very helpful app i usually get tracker apps use them for a week and then stop but ive managed to use this one for a month and a half now i recommend it for tracking your mood its awesome that it gives me a run down of it my symptoms seem to indicate depressive episodes or not
review_id: 1712 | content: helps keep track of my everyday mood
review_id: 1210 | content: at first i was skeptical of using a mood tracker but now that i have it and use it every day its pretty useful
review_id: 2888 | content: would be a great app it i could see my satictics without paying otherwise its amazing but if you want to track your emotions easily i suggest moving on
review_id: 3110 | content: this has actually really help me to understand my emotions and thoughts
review_id: 2513 | content: this app is amazing i love that it asks me questions about myself that i never would have thought of if it didnt get me to ask myself it even analyzes your answers and will suggestoffer therapy for those wgo feel like they need it its a wonderful experience and just an overall wonderful tool for anxiety and depression insights for ones mental health
review_id: 989 | content: going through borderline depression right now but this app has given me useful insights
review_id: 3093 | content: helpful keeping up with symptoms and seeing patterns to talk to my doctors about helps to get these thoughts out unfortunately i cant pay for all the help and videos it offers to deal with depression to get full access its it would be nice if it was more affordable and maybe a few more free things such as videos so we will know if paying more would actually be helpful
review_id: 1462 | content: it really helps me think about whats going on and to understand what causes it
review_id: 3474 | content: even if you cant complete the days on accident it still helps you see where you should improve on in your daily life and the free tools and hotlines are great
review_id: 254 | content: ive been using it for years helps me keep track
review_id: 1029 | content: please can you add more tags like for anxiety because afraid doesnt really explain how i feel
review_id: 147 | content: absolutely useless just a fancy mood tracker
review_id: 1420 | content: awesome didnt even know this app exist
review_id: 1813 | content: daily self check in helps me be mindful of my thoughts and feelings i like the journal the insights and the resources for things like grounding ones self and managing anxiety i am not able to do checks in a day feels a bit much that the app is structured that way hence instead of stars
review_id: 1200 | content: great app that lets me put my emotions into perspective
review_id: 301 | content: it really helps tracking your current mood
review_id: 949 | content: nice app ive found it helpful has some ni e insights and some bigger resources for free but not all are on the free version
review_id: 2560 | content: i really enjoy the audio files
review_id: 3243 | content: an excellent app to control your anxieties i have seen a huge improvement after i started using this app thank you so much to this app a most download for those having anxiety problems or depression or stress loads work loads n feeling frustrated youll soon start living a beautiful life thank you and dont give up
review_id: 1416 | content: its an amazing app to help track your well being although im not sure if this is actually a professional app i love how i can track my well being and learn more about what i struggle with and how to help myself i would totally recommend it to others
review_id: 956 | content: this app has been and still is surprisingly helpfull when it comes to monitoring my mood throughout the morningday and evening the psychological evaluation that occurs every days is also an added bonus and an eye opener there are certainly things that the developers could improve on in the future but i would definitely recommend that you give it a try
